examples: The above complaints are, I suspect, just the tip of the iceberg.
Unless we're all a lot more careful, the people who have died so far will be just the tip of the iceberg.
As for spinosaurus, diet was just the tip of the evolutionary iceberg.
Eventually, someone will figure out that this is just the tip of a virtual iceberg.
Another legend tells of a half-troll whose daughter was pushed onto a passing iceberg by her cousin.
